title: Two Sum Problem
content: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indicies of the two numbers that add up to that target.
author: playboicarti

solutions.author: playboicarti
solutions.explanation: This solution uses a hash map to store the indices...

comments.author: playboicarti
comments.content: Great solution! I like how you used a hash map.

comments.author: travisscott
comments.content: I think the brute-force solution is easier to understand for beginners.

solutions.author: travisscott
solutions.explanation: This solution uses a brute-force approach...

comments.author: playboicarti
comments.content: Your two-pointer solution is efficient and handles edge cases well.

comments.author: travisscott
comments.content: I prefer the built-in string functions for simplicity...

title: Palindrome Checker
content: Write a function that checks if a given string is a palindrome.
author: travisscott

solutions.author: playboicarti
solutions.explanation: This solution checks if the string is the same when reversed...

comments.author: playboicarti
comments.content: Thanks for the feedback! I agree that the brute-force method is more straightforward...

comments.author: travisscott
comments.content: I appreciate your comment! The hash map solution is definitely more efficient...

solutions.author: travisscott
solutions.explanation: This solution uses a two-pointer technique...
